Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Continued To Jul-10-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

An Amended Petitioner To Compromise Claim Of Person With A Disability In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult with Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Richard Antoine, Esq. for Petitioner: Rose Collins, present as Guardian ad litem for: James Youman, a Disable Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical Expenses $9,320.76
Costs $27,280.27
A net balance of $18,488.67 to be deposited into a blocked account with The Golden One Credit Union, 1301 Exposition Blvd., Sacramento, CA. 95815, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order.
Withdrawals of fund shall be made pursuant to an Ex Parte Application/Petition to the Probate Dept.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

Apr. 18, 2007
Orders rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Compromise Of Person With A Disability In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of a Person with Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Richard Antoine, Esq. for Petitioner: Rose Collins, present as Guardian ad litem for: James Youman, an Adult with Disability Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is DENIED without prejudice.
Counsel to prepare an Order for signature.
